  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • VR Support: Doesn't support VR
  • Additional Notes: Always make sure the player with the more powerful PC is the host (listen server) for the smoothest gameplay experience. A high-speed internet connection and a stable connection between players are required to play, as this is only a multiplayer game. Hosting sessions may also require more RAM than joining — 16 GB is the minimum, but 32 GB is recommended if hosting.
